places.name: Royal Greenhouses of Laeken
places.description: Lavish royal estate punctuated with heated greenhouses.

places.name: Le Cercueil (The Coffin)
places.description: The Devil’s own choice when he needs a drink in Brussels.

places.name: Comic Strip Route
places.description: This collection of over 50 murals celebrates Brussels' rich history as the self-proclaimed home of the "comic strip."

places.name: The Atomium
places.description: Climb inside an iron crystal magnified 165 billion times its normal size.

places.name: Délirium Café
places.description: Cozy basement bar sports an inventory of over 2,000 beers.

places.name: The Musical Instrument Museum
places.description: Three floors of musical instruments coming from all corners of the world and hundreds of years of musical history.

places.name: Musée de la Médecine
places.description: Medical history with an amazing, if frighting, collection of wax diseases on display.

places.name: Le Cercueil (The Coffin)
places.description: The Devil’s own choice when he needs a drink in Brussels.

places.name: Théâtre Royal de Toone
places.description: Drink among marionettes at this pub inside a historic puppet theater.

places.name: Neuhaus Chocolate Shop
places.description: The original shop where the iconic Belgian praline was invented.
